title: Smoky Wholemeal Pancakes
description: A delicious and filling breakfast dish made with wholemeal flour and a smoky twist.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the wholemeal flour and baking powder.
Add the smoky and shattering to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
Gradually add 1 cup of water to the mixture and stir until a smooth batter forms.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip and cook for another 1-2 minutes or until golden brown.
